input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('market.csv', 'r') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)
resolved = [r for r in rows if r.get('is_resolved') == 'True']
print(f'Total: {len(rows)}, Resolved: {len(resolved)}')
for r in resolved:
    print(f'RESOLVED: {r[\"qid\"]} | {r[\"title\"][:80]} | Answer: {r.get(\"ground_truth\", \"N/A\")}')
"
